'''mathovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headedness|headedness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headedness|headedness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mathovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mætheveth|mætheveth]] || [[word:mæthevej|mæthevej]] || [[word:mæthevesh|mæthevesh]] || [[word:mætheve|mætheve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mathothovoth|mathothovoth]] || [[word:mathothovoj|mathothovoj]] || [[word:mathothovosh|mathothovosh]] || [[word:mathothovo|mathothovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mathovoth|mathovoth]] || [[word:mathovoj|mathovoj]] || [[word:mathovosh|mathovosh]] || [[word:mathovo|mathovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mathofvofth|mathofvofth]] || [[word:mathofvofj|mathofvofj]] || [[word:mathofvofsh|mathofvofsh]] || [[word:mathofvof|mathofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mathovotho|mathovotho]] || [[word:mathovojo|mathovojo]] || [[word:mathovosho|mathovosho]] || [[word:mathovoko|mathovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mathovoth|mathovoth]] || [[word:mathovoj|mathovoj]] || [[word:mathovosh|mathovosh]] || [[word:mathovo|mathovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mathovothol|mathovothol]] || [[word:mathovojol|mathovojol]] || [[word:mathovoshol|mathovoshol]] || [[word:mathovokol|mathovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mathovoothotho|mathovoothotho]] || [[word:mathovoojojo|mathovoojojo]] || [[word:mathovooshosho|mathovooshosho]] || [[word:mathovooko|mathovooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mathovothon|mathovothon]] || [[word:mathovojon|mathovojon]] || [[word:mathovoshon|mathovoshon]] || [[word:mathovokon|mathovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mathovothooro|mathovothooro]] || [[word:mathovojooro|mathovojooro]] || [[word:mathovoshooro|mathovoshooro]] || [[word:mathovokooro|mathovokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|8a892ea}}
